name: wp-bootstrap-linux-build-fix
title: Debug and fix hex bootstrap missing from Linux build
description: Bootstrap command works on macOS but mysteriously vanishes from Linux binary despite clean compilation. Isolate link-time issue and restore bootstrap to Linux release binary.

phases.title: Isolate compiler divergence
phases.description: Find where macOS and Linux builds diverge — LLVM IR generation, linking, or dead code elimination

tasks.title: Capture verbose build output for both platforms
tasks.description:
Run: cargo build -p hex-cli --release -v 2>&1 | tee /tmp/macos-build.log (macOS) and on Linux.
Grep for 'bootstrap' in both logs. Compare.
If bootstrap appears in macOS but not Linux LLVM output, it's a codegen issue.

tasks.title: Check if bootstrap module is dead-code eliminated on Linux
tasks.description:
cargo build -p hex-cli --release --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu 2>&1 | grep -i 'dead code\|unused\|bootstrap'.
If bootstrap code is marked unused on Linux but not macOS, check if there's a platform-specific trait bound or feature gate.

tasks.title: Verify Commands enum dispatch is identical on both
tasks.description:
Compare hex-cli/src/main.rs across platforms (git diff main~1 hex-cli/src/main.rs | grep -A5 -B5 Bootstrap).
Ensure Commands::Bootstrap(args) => commands::bootstrap::run(args).await is present and unconditional.

phases.title: Apply fix and validate
phases.description: Once root cause found, apply fix (likely: add explicit use statement, remove dead code marker, or fix trait bound)

tasks.title: Implement fix based on P1 findings
tasks.description: Apply the minimal fix that restores bootstrap to Linux binary. Rebuild both platforms.

tasks.title: Verify bootstrap in Linux binary
tasks.description:
cargo build -p hex-cli --release --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
file target/x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/release/hex
./target/x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/release/hex --help | grep bootstrap
./target/x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/release/hex bootstrap --help

tasks.title: Commit fix
tasks.description:
git add hex-cli/src/
git commit -m 'fix: restore bootstrap command to Linux binary (compiler divergence)'
Include root cause in commit message.

phases.title: E2E test on Bazzite
phases.description: Once bootstrap is in Linux binary, test on Bazzite

tasks.title: Deploy fixed hex to Bazzite
tasks.description:
scp target/x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/release/hex bazzite:~/hex-intf/target/release/hex
or: cd ~/hex-intf && git pull && cargo build -p hex-cli --release

tasks.title: Test bootstrap --dry-run on Bazzite
tasks.description:
ssh bazzite './target/release/hex bootstrap --dry-run'
Verify output shows:
- Prereq check (rust, bun, cargo, SpacetimeDB, Ollama)
- Service startup plan (SpacetimeDB, hex-nexus, Ollama)
- Model loading (qwen3:4b, qwen2.5-coder:32b, devstral-small-2:24b)
- Config setup (.hex/project.json)
- Validation status

tasks.title: Test bootstrap --profile dev (actual execution)
tasks.description:
ssh bazzite 'OLLAMA_VULKAN=true ./target/release/hex bootstrap --profile dev'
Verify:
- Services start (check lsof -i :5555, :11434, etc.)
- Models load into Ollama (ollama list)
- .hex/project.json created with tier defaults
- hex doctor passes
